rule_text: For Remedy 03: GP referral is required for specialist consultation
status: and access to clinics and hospitals. The DHA e-referral process or equivalent approved method applies. No referral is needed for emergency cases.

rule_text: For essential benefit style outpatient access specialist and consultant services require a GP referral through the DHA e-referral process or equivalent approved method.
For Remedy 02: GP referral is required for specialist consultation and specialist care. The DHA e-referral process or equivalent approved method applies. No referral is needed for emergency cases.
